sections.paragraph:
Original: מתוּשׁאל

Transliteration: methûshâ'êl

Phonetic: meth-oo-shaw-ale'

BDB Definition:

Methusael = "who is of God"
  1. son of Mehujael, 4th in descent from Cain, and father of Lamech

Origin: from H4962 and H410, with the relative interposed

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
